utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance for named individuals with plan names and monthly costs; also lists add-ons with monthly costs. This meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' 2) property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with plan name and monthly cost. This meets 'home/contents insurance with costs.' 3) travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance plan and an add-on with monthly costs. This meets 'travel insurance with costs.' 4) additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs (monthly membership with discount, and one-time claims advocacy fee). This meets 'any enhancement services with costs.' 5) total_budget: Provides total monthly cost with discount and notes a one-time fee. This meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' at least for monthly and one-time; no annual figure, but monthly is provided, which satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' minimally via monthly. Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan, identify each selected item and match it exactly to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. Items present: PrimeCare Premium physical health for Carlos, PrimeCare Premium mental health for Carlos, InsurePlus Standard physical and mental health for Lucas and Isabella, Wellness Programs add-on, Specialist Access add-on, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for home content, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, Business Travel Support add-on, Premium Insurance Membership, and Claims Advocacy Service. Then map each to its rating number from the ground-truth.
